---
id: get-comparables
title: "Get comparable bond peers"
description: "Returns same-issuer peers first, then sector/rating/tenor peers for relative-value analysis."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get comparable bond peers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments/{id}/comparables"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns same-issuer peers first, then sector/rating/tenor peers for relative-value analysis.
